summary: Schema-named reflect handoff, written during p15 closure. The 2026-07-08 reflect pass wrote its handoff as reflect-to-next.json, which the stage-gate does not resolve; this file restores the expected name. Content is reconciled with reflection.md and the 2026-07-09 verification run: all 5/5 changes complete, all five local gates green (ci-check.sh, cargo test --workspace with DATABASE_URL unset, helm lint, check_api_versions.sh, verify-migrations.sh). Recommended next phase: v1.0-release-closure.
